sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12223" key="a)plusi/a1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπλῠσία</orth> (A), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἄπλυτος</etym>) <sense id="n12223.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">filthiness, filth,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.377</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eryc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
